name: Block Permanent Delegate Tokens
description: Blocks Token-2022 tokens with Permanent Delegate extension (enables burn without signature)
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token has Permanent Delegate - can burn your tokens without signature

metadata.impact: 40%+ of new Solana tokens in 2026, $50M+ losses in Q1 2026
metadata.attack_vector: Attacker can burn victim tokens seconds after purchase without requiring victim signature

name: Block Transfer Hook Tokens
description: Blocks Token-2022 tokens with Transfer Hook extension (malicious callback on every transfer)
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token has Transfer Hook - can block or steal tokens during transfers

metadata.attack_vector: Malicious program called on every transfer - can revert (honeypot) or drain tokens
metadata.note: Legitimate use cases exist (e.g. loyalty points, compliance), but high risk

name: Alert on Extreme Transfer Fees
description: Alerts on Token-2022 tokens with transfer fees >50% (effective drain)
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 CRITICAL: Token has extreme transfer fee (>50%) - transfers will be drained

metadata.attack_vector: Every transfer loses >50% to fee collector - effective drain mechanism

name: Alert on High Transfer Fees
description: Alerts on Token-2022 tokens with transfer fees >10% (suspicious)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ HIGH RISK: Token has high transfer fee (>10%) - suspicious fee structure

metadata.note: Legitimate projects rarely exceed 3-5% transfer fees

name: Alert on Default Frozen Account State
description: Alerts on tokens where new accounts are frozen by default (honeypot)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ HIGH RISK: Token accounts are frozen by default - you won't be able to transfer

metadata.attack_vector: New token accounts created as frozen - can buy but not sell

name: Alert on Metadata Pointer
description: Alerts when token uses Metadata Pointer (can point to fake metadata)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ CAUTION: Token uses Metadata Pointer - verify token details are accurate

metadata.attack_vector: Metadata pointer can be changed to display fake token name/symbol/logo
metadata.note: Common in legitimate Token-2022 implementations, but can be abused

name: Info: Token-2022 Detected
description: Informational alert when Token-2022 tokens are detected
author: securecheck

rule.message: ℹ️ INFO: Transaction involves Token-2022 tokens (extended features enabled)

metadata.note: Token-2022 enables advanced features but also new attack vectors. Enable this rule for visibility.
